programme.title: 金石情
programme.desc: 刘贞莲不幸身患麻疯，其父刘员外招赘穷书生李孝文为婿，意图卖疯传毒。贞莲将真相和盘托出，孝文感于贞莲真情，决意回乡禀明母亲，迎接贞莲返家。孝文走后，贞莲万念俱灰，竟狂饮毒酒，以图自尽...

programme.title: 销魂玉
programme.desc: 王致和无意得到通灵玩意，许下三个愿望，虽然愿望灵验之极，结果落得家散人亡；风尘女孟薇被情人林坤全害死，变成水鬼复仇；艳丽女子萧云玉香消玉殒后，仍不断在人间走动，盗坟贼欲挖开萧云玉坟墓盗取陪葬珠宝，终被萧云玉追杀致死...

programme.title: 绝不低头
programme.desc: 少女波波为寻父和找寻未婚夫罗烈，遇上童时玩伴黑豹，黑豹是城中势力最大金二爷的助手。波波在黑豹照料下，逐渐忘记罗烈而爱上黑豹，黑豹自幼就喜欢波波，但是处处输给罗烈，心狠手辣的他，逼婚不成，便在波波面前折磨金二爷，原来金二爷竟是波波的父亲赵大爷，后来罗烈出狱...

programme.title: 射雕英雄传续集
programme.desc: 欧阳锋得悉郭靖以九阴真经的功夫于选婿比武中获胜，并娶得黄蓉为妻，于是把黄蓉挟走，要胁郭靖要默写九阴真经才会释放黄蓉。最终郭靖会否为救出黄蓉而就范？

programme.title: 女儿国
programme.desc: 本片讲述唐僧、孙悟空、猪八戒及沙和尚一行四人往西天取经，行至西梁女儿国，国内全是女人，而传宗接代生儿育女全靠「招胎泉」，饮过这泉水便可成孕，但也只能生女。

programme.title: 方世玉与洪熙官
programme.desc: 清兵火烧少林寺，少林弟子洪熙官身受重伤，负伤潜逃。刚巧方世玉经过，误认洪熙官为无恶不作之徒，并将其交付清兵。当方世玉知道自己误捉洪熙官时，千方百计要救出他，好让二人可合力将清兵击退。

programme.title: 花木兰
programme.desc: 花木兰因父亲年事已高，毅然女扮男装替父从军，对战匈奴。她英勇善战，屡立奇功，更被擢升为大将军。木兰衣锦还乡，为家族赢得了无上的荣光。元帅欲将女儿许配给她的时候，才得知她是女儿身。

programme.title: 新独臂刀
programme.desc: 姜大卫饰演一个宁愿自废右臂退出江湖，也不愿委屈求全的大侠，一直过着隐姓埋名的生活。直到至爱被绑架，好兄弟被杀害，他誓要重出江湖与恶势力一战。

programme.title: 徐老虎与白寡妇
programme.desc: 本片改编自高阳同名著作，获第18届金马奖最佳服装设计、最佳美术设计两项奖。本片讲述清朝食盐私枭徐老虎与白寡妇因清官李振彪拒不受贿，再加上责令严缉私盐，二人面临缉案危机。为免同僚落网，白独担罪责。徐悉白被处死，一心复仇...

programme.title: 七侠五义
programme.desc: 太师之子在陈州贪赃枉法，私吞皇粮，被包拯当场斩首处死。太师知道后大怒，并令人刺杀包拯，幸得展昭及时阻止，救回他一命。皇上的珍品被偷的同时，宫中又发生谋杀案，于是，皇上限定包拯要在十天内破案。展昭马上出发搜捕凶手。包拯和展昭最后可否如期破案？

programme.title: 西游记
programme.desc: 本片根据中国经典同名名著改编。故事讲述唐僧赴西天取经，中途在五指山收服马骝精；在高家庄收服猪八戒；在流沙河收服沙悟净的种种情节。。

programme.title: 铁手无情
programme.desc: 沧州捕头铁无情嫉恶如仇，先后击杀沧州剧盗。铁被盗首马威甲的夺魂笔所伤，混乱间，以马的坐骑突围而出，竟被送往马家，认识马双目失明的女儿桂姑。最后，铁与马于山上决战，马终伏法，铁返回桂姑身边。

programme.title: 武则天
programme.desc: 武则天有倾国之貌，绝世才华，十四岁时更被唐太宗召为才人，但太宗死后却入寺为尼，却又与继位之唐高宗有染，生有二子。时皇后与萧妃争宠，命武则天回宫以制妃子，却反陷害皇后。武则天获封皇后之后，更诛杀两太子。直到高宗病亡，武后临朝，成为史上第一个女皇帝。

programme.title: 中华丈夫
programme.desc: 何滔乃日本华裔商人之子，长大后武艺超凡。滔承父之命与日商之女弓子结婚，岂料妻子原来也练得一身出色的日本武术，两人不时为斗气而比武。有日弓子更斗气返回娘家，滔图以激将法写信约弓子回来比武，岂料信被其他日本人看到，以为滔想向日本武术宣战，滔遂与日本武术界展开连场激斗...

programme.title: 艳阳天
programme.desc: 钢琴师李燕南与乐队指挥女儿陈小芸相爱，常指点她歌唱技巧。小芸在一次代替演出中一鸣惊人，得团主及花花公子杜邦杰力捧。小芸赴星马演出，心却惦念燕南，一夜与杜邦杰于车内发生争执，怎料汽车失事...

programme.title: 宋宫秘史
programme.desc: 包公发现刘妃在二十年前为保其位而谋害李妃，将李妃刚诞下的儿子调走后，把她逐出皇宫。于是，包公用妙计诱大太监郭槐认罪，揭发当年他与刘妃合谋陷害李妃之奸计，并将刘妃定罪。而李妃也被接回皇宫，与已为皇帝的儿子团聚。

programme.title: 快活林
programme.desc: 武松杀死潘金莲及西门庆后，被判发配孟州牢营。武松元照例要接受一百下杀威棒，但得施恩求情，侥幸获得豁免。武松为报答施恩，当知道她的「快活林」酒家被「蒋门神」蒋忠夺去，誓要不惜一切助她取回酒家。

programme.title: 铁扇公主
programme.desc: 一段紧张奇情的取西经故事，由孙悟空师徒行经火焰山，大战铁扇公主，白骨精及其妹妹展开。

programme.title: 流星蝴蝶剑
programme.desc: 这部武侠传奇故事，集合瑰丽的画面、诡秘悬疑、权力斗争及动作于一身，成功地将精彩的动作场面与紧凑的剧情结合。藉江湖两大帮会内部叛变，从而刻划出人性叵测及真善混淆的一面。

programme.title: 老夫子奇趣录
programme.desc: 电影承上集继续笑料百出。这次，大蕃薯开了一家中医诊所，但传统的中医似乎不为时髦的香港社会接受。最后得靠好友老夫子相助，为他解决疑难！

programme.title: 黑灵官
programme.desc: 人称「黑灵官」的宫天龙，押解杀人犯关云飞时遇上大风雪，被迫在宫天龙家留宿。当晚关云飞获同伙所救，逃脱前更砍杀宫天龙之母及幼妹。其后，宫天龙因押解囚犯不利，被打入大牢。宫天龙出狱后，誓要杀死关云飞为家人报仇。

programme.title: 貂蝉
programme.desc: 汉朝末年太师董卓霸道专横，弄权祸国，忠臣王允誓要利用貂蝉的美色设计除掉董卓。王允得知董卓的义子吕布见貂蝉貌若天仙一见钟情，于是将计就计把貂蝉献给董卓为妾，终使父子反目。吕布最后杀了父亲董卓，自此与貂蝉成为眷属。

programme.title: 六指琴魔
programme.desc: 女侠风灵得悉"六弦魔琴"重现江湖，唯一能克制魔琴的只有火弦弓及火羽箭，唯袖手樵隐知其下落；风找得群雄一起找樵；期间，众人发现逍遥隐士就是六指琴魔...

programme.title: 鬼新娘
programme.desc: 七十年代偶像巨星邢慧和杨帆带来的惊悚片，提醒您千万别娶被附身的女人为妻，她绝对不会放过您！剧中的女鬼生前被叔叔奸杀，现在要借用邢慧的身体报仇！

programme.title: 冷血十三鹰
programme.desc: 铁船帮杀手戚明星决意要逃离帮会后，遭其帮会杀手追杀，幸得侠士卓一帆所救，才幸免于难。其后卓一帆意外发现戚明星竟是其杀妻仇人，但在得悉戚明星对此愧疚不已后，饶恕他的过犯。最终两人惺惺相惜，决定联手击败铁船帮.

programme.title: 倾国倾城
programme.desc: 李翰祥史诗式电影，艺术成就及导演功力震惊中港台三地。本片荣获金马优等剧情片、最佳女主角及最佳彩色影片美术设计奖项。影后卢燕饰慈禧太后；处女演出即成名的萧瑶，饰死后受追封为贵妃的珍妃；而为珍妃逝世而不近女色的光绪帝则是狄龙。

programme.title: 断魂谷
programme.desc: 断魂谷赵家庄主赵云阳有两弟子，赵玉龙和赵剑英。玉龙终年浪荡江湖，却得云阳所有财产。剑英不愤，害死师父嫁祸玉龙，幷引其子金虎追杀玉龙。两人在断魂谷决斗，剑英欲收渔人之利，幸金虎和玉龙发现谷中有埋伏，诈伤引出主谋，连手反攻...

programme.title: 天才冲冲冲
programme.desc: 「寓教于乐」的大型综艺节目, 节目单元不仅推陈出新, 在生活中更能与三五好友, 一同尝试节目中的各项游戏, 亲身体验节目中的各项乐趣。

programme.title: 亲爱的客栈2026
programme.desc: 节目以"慢下来，趣生活"为核心，经营一家有趣、好玩、有温度的年轻客栈。在经营与体验中，解锁未知惊喜，邂逅温暖故事，共赴一场关于陪伴、治愈与热爱的"趣生活"之旅。

programme.title: 声生不息·华流季
programme.desc: 以"华流国际化"为核心，《声生不息·华流季》以音乐对抗与融合为引，推动华语音乐走向世界。从金曲回忆到文化共鸣，跨越三代的声音在舞台上汇聚，用旋律唤醒集体记忆，谱写属于华语乐坛的自信新章。

programme.title: 山海夏味
programme.desc: 《山海夏味》通过市井美食和鲜味文化，探访街头小店的烹饪智慧与地域精神。节目打破精致摆盘套路，用生动镜头展现活鱼、热锅等原始食材冲击力，聚焦坚守在烟火中的普通人，呈现一方水土的饮食江湖与生活哲学。

programme.title: 去湘当有味的地方
programme.desc: 汪涵作为大哥带领沈梦辰、吴泽林网罗全省美食，借此展现14个市州丰富多元的湘菜味道，透过美食背后的故事，展现湖南各地独特的乡情烟火气。

programme.title: 夜限照相馆
programme.desc: 剧情讲述只为逝者存在的鬼客专门照相馆的刻薄摄影师徐奇周（周元饰）和热血的律师韩春（权娜拉饰）与阴森森的夜客们来往于生死之间惊险又奇妙的故事。

programme.title: 夜限照相馆
programme.desc: 剧情讲述只为逝者存在的鬼客专门照相馆的刻薄摄影师徐奇周（周元饰）和热血的律师韩春（权娜拉饰）与阴森森的夜客们来往于生死之间惊险又奇妙的故事。

programme.title: 非诚勿扰
programme.desc: 非诚勿扰是一档适应现代生活节奏的大型婚恋交友节目, 在广大单身男女提供了一个公开的婚恋交友平台的同时, 也迎来了新的当红男星作为新一任的非诚合伙人。

programme.title: 声生不息·华流季
programme.desc: 以"华流国际化"为核心，《声生不息·华流季》以音乐对抗与融合为引，推动华语音乐走向世界。从金曲回忆到文化共鸣，跨越三代的声音在舞台上汇聚，用旋律唤醒集体记忆，谱写属于华语乐坛的自信新章。

programme.title: 山海夏味
programme.desc: 《山海夏味》通过市井美食和鲜味文化，探访街头小店的烹饪智慧与地域精神。节目打破精致摆盘套路，用生动镜头展现活鱼、热锅等原始食材冲击力，聚焦坚守在烟火中的普通人，呈现一方水土的饮食江湖与生活哲学。

programme.title: 灼灼风流
programme.desc: 讲述了心存凌云之志、一心考取功名的女官慕灼华（景甜饰）与沙场沐血折戟、誓为同袍雪冤的战神刘衍（冯绍峰饰）彼此救赎、相知相爱，携手守家卫国的故事。

programme.title: 灼灼风流
programme.desc: 讲述了心存凌云之志、一心考取功名的女官慕灼华（景甜饰）与沙场沐血折戟、誓为同袍雪冤的战神刘衍（冯绍峰饰）彼此救赎、相知相爱，携手守家卫国的故事。

programme.title: 天才冲冲冲
programme.desc: 「寓教于乐」的大型综艺节目, 节目单元不仅推陈出新, 在生活中更能与三五好友, 一同尝试节目中的各项游戏, 亲身体验节目中的各项乐趣。

programme.title: 危险人物
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】初出茅庐的小混混阿杰与好友在江湖闯荡，却因意外卷入黑帮纷争。在血雨腥风中，兄弟情义与江湖道义面临着残酷的考验，一场致命的追逐就此展开。

programme.title: 综艺大热门
programme.desc: 由幽默风趣的吴宗宪、陈汉典、黃路梓茵联手主持带您闹翻天！最强综艺节目保证娱乐性十足，让你笑声不断，千万别错过。

programme.title: Manuel Antonio
programme.desc: In the Manuel Antonio region of Costa Rica, Genevieve’s quest for wildlife leads her from rainforest to ocean.

programme.title: Kungsberget Rush
programme.desc: One rookie, one snowstorm, one giant slope - Robbie swaps city life for ski life in the wild winter playground of Kungsberget.

programme.title: Bikaner
programme.desc: From miniature paintings on palace walls to elaborate havelis, Asmita finds out that Bikaner is an art lover’s paradise.

programme.title: Santa Village, Finland
programme.desc: Emeline Nsingi Nkosi goes to the Arctic Circle, where she meets Santa Claus in his office. She also tries midnight sun floating.

programme.title: Chhattisgarh 2
programme.desc: As Aradhana’s journey in Chhattisgarh continues, she is stunned to discover the wealth of natural beauty that the state has to offer.

programme.title: Mount Kailash 3
programme.desc: Mohit realizes just what it takes to descend 4444 steps and walk along a furious river to reach the base camp on the trek to Mount Kailash.

programme.title: Corcovado
programme.desc: Guided by an irresistible call to adventure, young American traveler, Genevieve Sexton ventures deep into Costa Rica.

programme.title: Gotland Tales
programme.desc: Robbie steps into a fairytale on the island of Gotland - medieval walls, mysterious lagoons, and rugged beauty collide in this windswept wonderland.

programme.title: Budapest 2
programme.desc: Sabrina Chakici gets up, close and personal with Budapest, the capital of Hungary, and she gets to know about its history and character.

programme.title: Rovaniemi, Finland
programme.desc: In Rovaniemi, Emeline Nsingi Nkosi visits a husky farm, tries fishing with a local and participates in a curious Finnish tradition.

programme.title: Chhattisgarh 3
programme.desc: On the last leg of her journey in Chhattisgarh, Aradhana uncovers the hidden world of the state’s artistic legacy.

programme.title: Mount Kailash 4
programme.desc: On his journey to Mount Kailash, Mohit finds out the role of the Indo-Tibetan Border Police in ensuring the safety of pilgrims.

programme.title: Episode 1
programme.desc: Rohit and Manasi are on the Maharajas’ Express. Their first destination is Udaipur, where they bump into an old friend who knows all their secrets.

programme.title: Gothenburg Drift
programme.desc: Crayfish safaris, floating saunas, and fika breaks galore - Robbie slows it down on Sweden’s effortlessly cool west coast.

programme.title: Kamalaya, Thailand
programme.desc: Jamie Srubis tries a variety of detoxifying spa treatments at the Kamalaya Wellness Resort in Koh Samui, Thailand.

programme.title: Levi, Finland
programme.desc: Emeline Nsingi Nkosi bakes cookies with Santa’s helpers in Elves village, in Levi. She also rides river rapids on a car inner tube..

programme.title: Nagaland, Kohima
programme.desc: Originally called ‘Kehwira’, the capital of Nagaland, Kohima was the site of one of the bloodiest battles of World War II.

programme.title: Mount Kailash 5
programme.desc: After crossing over to Tibet, Mohit visits a sacred site for Hindus and Jains, and catches his first glimpse of Mount Kailash.

programme.title: Episode 2
programme.desc: On a trip aboard the Maharajas’ Express, Rohit and Manasi find themselves taking a walk on the wild side.

programme.title: Trollhättan Trails
programme.desc: From epic waterfalls to hidden street art and one last party in Gothenburg - Robbie’s Swedish story ends with a cinematic splash.

programme.title: Evason Mai'n, Jordan
programme.desc: At Evason Ma’In resort in Jordan, Jamie Srubis tries spa treatments, which use the healing qualities of the nearby Hammamat Ma’In hot springs.

programme.title: Ruka Kuusamo, Finland
programme.desc: Through Finnish activities such as foraging and reindeer herding, Emeline Nsingi Nkosi learns about Sisu - the Finnish secret to happiness.

programme.title: Nagaland, Kohnoma & Wokha
programme.desc: On a bike trip across the Nagaland, Rohan gets a chance to meet some fearless and simple Naga tribes.

programme.title: Mount Kailash 6
programme.desc: 12 days of braving inhospitable weather conditions and treacherous terrain leads Mohit to the hallowed Mount Kailash._x000D__x000D_

programme.title: Mauritius 1
programme.desc: Explore the magical island of Mauritius with Sakshi as she visits an abandoned lighthouse, and experiences water activities like snorkeling, undersea walking also explores underwater ecology.

programme.title: Thailand 5 Must Do's For Kids
programme.desc: Keeping kids entertained is not a herculean task in Thailand, so let them live their childhood fantasies as we unroll a freewheeling adventure in "The Land of Smiles."

programme.title: Lotus Temple
programme.desc: Encircled by prim lush greens, stands a concrete flower half open called the Bahá'i House of Worship, more commonly known as the Lotus Temple.

programme.title: Gaya Island Resort, Malaysia
programme.desc: Jamie Srubis tries a massage inspired by the waves of the sea and a chocolate vanilla body wrap at the Gaya Island Resort in Malaysia.

programme.title: Bryggen
programme.desc: A world heritage site Bergen in Norway is famous for the row of wooden houses on one side of the old wharf called Bryggen. More than 900 years old these houses have seen history unfold.

programme.title: Floating Market
programme.desc: Unveil the hidden treasures of Thailand's time-honored Klong Lat Phli: a floating legacy.

programme.title: Nagaland, Mokokchung
programme.desc: Rohan discovers the rock and gospel music craze in Nagaland when he attends a music festival in Mokokchung village.

programme.title: Mount Kailash 7
programme.desc: From magnificent monasteries sprawled over craggy hills to the soul-cleansing Mansarovar lake, Mohit has a tryst with Tibet’s deep spiritual heritage.

programme.title: Mauritius 2
programme.desc: Join Sakshi as she ziplines, enjoying the stunning landscapes and followed by a submarine ride. Further explores the capital, Port Louis she ends the day after exploring the Vanilla Crocodile Park.

programme.title: Agra, India
programme.desc: Kirsty comes to Agra, the erstwhile capital of Mughal kings, where she gets a chance to experience the splendor associated with the Mughal dynasty.

programme.title: Must Visit, Budapest
programme.desc: We have the lowdown on the must-hit spots of Budapest that will make your rendezvous with the Hungarian capital unforgettable.

programme.title: San Augustin Church
programme.desc: Heritage brings you the oldest stone church (built in 1589) in Philippines, the San Augustine church which is a respite from the chaos of Manila.

programme.title: Rizal Park
programme.desc: Also known as Luneta Park, This landmark has been part of historic episodes, the most significant being the execution of the Philippine national leader Jose Rizal.

programme.title: Nagaland, Mon
programme.desc: Rohan visits a village in Nagaland where the country border between India and Myanmar, passes through the village chief’s house.

programme.desc: Aradhana embarks on an adventure to uncover the hidden wonders of a land steeped in spirituality and untamed wilderness: Chhattisgarh!

programme.title: The Pacific (2026)

programme.title: One Day Revolution
programme.desc: It was the original cricket revolution, and the game hasn't been the same since. The '80s saw the rise of the one-day format, capturing a new generation of fans and turning the gentleman's game into a new national obsession.

programme.title: Weekend Breakfast (2026)
programme.desc: All the news you need to start your Sunday. Fauziah Ibrahim and Lorna Dunkley bring you the latest news, interviews, politics, culture, weather and global affairs. Plus sport with Daniela Intili.

programme.title: Reclaiming Pride
programme.desc: Ex-Pentecostal preacher Anthony Venn-Brown struggled with his sexuality and submitted to conversion practices. His coming out and activism helped reform laws ending the practices, turning his shame into a source of pride.

programme.title: J Music
programme.desc: 《J Music》致力打造高质音乐平台，一众歌手有展示音乐实力的机会之余，也可让乐迷更深入了解歌手的音乐故事。节目邀请「人气」歌手担任嘉宾，由嘉宾亲自挑选其喜欢的新旧作品，并即场演唱，分享喜爱曲目。

programme.title: 东张西望
programme.desc: 《东张西望》星期一至日，紧贴追踪社会大事、趣闻逸事，并报导娱乐圈最新动态、艺人消息，以及剧集宣传和花絮。「今日突发」环节为大家追踪即日热门新闻；专题环节，深入探讨大众关心的时事、社会及民生问题，并访问相关的专家。

programme.title: 新闻透视
programme.desc: 《新闻透视》，每周专题报道多段香港以至国际的瞩目新闻，聚焦港人最关心的民生话题，并邀请各界人士、学者、专家，一同深入探讨个中来龙去脉。

programme.title: 周六聊Teen谷
programme.desc: 踏入科技年代，青少年对新兴电子产品、网络流行媒体尤感兴趣，追上时代步伐，已成新世代指标！主持陈星妤、陈懿德、王菲用尽所能搜罗世界各地至潮、至新情报，上至世界盛事、医学百科、文艺与科技；下至日常生活、网络热搜，跟观众一一分享。

programme.title: 地球村民

programme.title: 港生活．港享受

programme.title: 一周星星
programme.desc: 访谈节目《一周星星》，每集邀请星级艺人、界别名人，与区永权、许文轩、王镇泉等娱乐主播，分享新近工作企划，谈论电影、电视、演唱会相关的特别话题，尤其是网民与圈中朋友关心热议的人和事！

programme.title: 美食新闻周报
programme.desc: 黄嘉雯、倪嘉雯、伍倩彤等美食主播、主持，紧贴最新美食潮流，从不同平台网罗超人气餐厅消息，主持亲自试食，带来真实食评。节目精选《美食新闻报道》介绍的多间餐厅，力推当中招牌美食，并会速递美食优惠，让观众实时掌握最滋味、抵食的饮食情报。

programme.title: 晚间新闻
programme.desc: 每晚报道香港、两岸、国际重要新闻以及体育消息，让你洞悉各地大事及体坛动向。

programme.title: 关云长
programme.desc: 这是一场发生在三国动荡时期的史诗式之旅。曹操试图招揽关羽加入他的阵营，但关羽忠于他的结拜兄弟刘备，也是曹操的敌人。当关羽试图从曹操手上救出刘备的小妾时，迫于无奈要大开杀戒。最后他能否杀出重围？

programme.title: 靓足100分
programme.desc: 林天赐的富商祖父病重，欲将遗产留给他，但条件是天赐要在一个月内结婚，否则遗产将归祖父侄儿罗伯特。不久天赐邂逅乐小小，两人渐生情愫。罗伯特即派玛丽琳利用美人计破坏他俩的感情。不料玛丽琳贪图遗产，准备真的与林结婚。罗心有不甘，捣乱婚礼，并揭发她的计谋...

programme.title: 错爱迷踪
programme.desc: 跟朋友在酒吧喝酒的女孩邂逅恐怖小说家，两人一见钟情感情迅速升温。原来女孩已悄然落入惊天迷局，全因小说家的前女友是个毁容的女鬼，她借用人面还魂复仇，与前男友联手开启夺命惊吓。

programme.title: 神勇双妹唛
programme.desc: 故事描述一对表姐妹梁山伯与祝英台乃斗气冤家，两女为争夺神秘俊男阿山欢心，却惹来大圈杀手威吓逼害，更陷入一场宝物争夺战。两女身陷险境，惟有摒弃前嫌，联手反抗......

programme.title: 除暴安良
programme.desc: 三名持枪劫匪抢劫了一批正在运送的新发行货币，刑警常勇奉命展开调查。随着线索逐渐浮现，常勇成功击毙一名劫匪。然而，其他两名劫匪不甘就此罢手，乘乱密谋抢劫金厂的黄金。常勇凭藉精密的部署，成功粉碎了他们的计划，将不法分子绳之以法。

programme.title: 贼王之王
programme.desc: 两名私家侦探欲藉破一连环大劫案而声名大噪。岂料调查过程中竟一再被贼王使计愚弄，笑话连篇。及后更发现原来所有劫案均与日商宫本有关，到底谁才是真正的贼王之王？

programme.title: 黑白潜行
programme.desc: 香港警员阿山以卧底身份潜伏在监狱，接近罪犯天哥，以获取其犯罪集团的更多证据。二人获释后，阿山全力帮助天哥扶摇直上，最终使天哥成为集团的主脑。然而，当阿山协助警方顺利摧毁犯罪集团时，他却意外揭开了天哥的一个惊天秘密...

programme.title: 龙的传人
programme.desc: 青年周小龙离开纯朴的离岛到香港发展。他的师叔欺骗小龙参加桌球比赛，并以他父亲的地皮作为赌注。小龙最后输掉了比赛，幸得他青梅竹马的朋友毛毛鼓励，把自家的田地也作为赌注。小龙最后能否把自己的土地赢回来？

programme.title: 武状元苏乞儿
programme.desc: 苏乞儿原为贵族，但因上京考武状元时作弊，被眨为乞儿。苏乞儿在机缘巧合下救了丐帮长老，并接任为新帮主。一天，皇上狩猎之时，差点被暗杀，幸苏乞儿及时救驾。皇帝欲恢复其官职时，苏乞儿却拒绝。其后，皇上御赐一个乞儿钵予苏乞儿，从此他过着愉快的行乞生活。

programme.title: 替枪老豆
programme.desc: 万与夏婚后多年忽想生育，但万被证实不育，让夏接受人工受孕；但万心中仍感怪异，内心矛盾弄得精神紧张，行为乖张，闹出不少笑话；万在夏平安产子前后，屡有奇异幻想，误会连场，猜疑甚多，更怀疑夏与任职于夏威夷精子银行的表哥潘震伟有染，不是人工受孕，而是被人受孕。

programme.title: 火云邪神之修罗面具
programme.desc: 十八年前，邪恶的黑羽会潜入了老邪神西城勇的地盘，盗走了修罗面具，而利用修罗面具放出当时只是个婴儿的魔神。老邪神为了魔神日后不作恶收养了婴儿，教他好好做人，成为小邪神。小邪神最后控制了面具的力量成为老邪神的接班人，继续守护城市。

programme.title: 破坏之王
programme.desc: 外卖员何金银为让他的女神阿丽对他刮目相看，发奋习武，并学了奇怪的招式。胆小怕事的他一次头戴加菲猫面具拯救了阿丽，不料事后被空手道大师段水流领功。银为揭穿真相，最终在擂台使出绝招"无敌风火轮"击败段大师，并抱得美人归。

programme.title: 醉拳
programme.desc: 年轻气盛的黄飞鸿因招惹地方恶霸之子，被父亲送去跟随「醉拳大师」苏乞儿受训一年。当父亲揭发恶霸欲将国有矿产卖给日本人的阴谋后，顿成刺杀目标。为救父并阻止交易，飞鸿施展自创的「醉拳」，击败众杀手。

programme.title: 十万火急
programme.desc: 这是关于香港消防员的英勇救火故事。勇敢的消防员无惧冲天大火，肩负救灾扶危的重任，甚至舍身救人。但当消防员脱下制服后，是否仍同样勇敢地面对自身的难题呢？

programme.title: The Strength To Smile
programme.desc: The Banks family supports Lisa when they host an event in memory of her mother at the mansion; Will puts his feelings of mistrust aside and steps up to the plate for the Bankses and Lisa.

programme.title: Payback's A B*Tch
programme.desc: Will and Carlton throw a house party at the Banks mansion; when Phil unexpectedly shows up at Viv's art event, their relationship is shaken by a lack of trust; Hilary stands up to Kylo after he posts a video of her without her consent.

programme.title: Stardust
programme.desc: A young man discovers the meaning of true love while battling princes, ghosts and an evil witch in a quest to protect the girl of his dreams.

programme.title: Hollywood On Set S1
programme.desc: Each week Hollywood On Set goes behind-the-scenes on three major movies in production, featuring action footage and interviews with filmmakers.

programme.title: Yeti Confetti Chapter 3: Sherbet Scoop
programme.desc: Lucy decides to tell a story during a Yeti cloud-making ceremony about a Yeti-Elder she doesn't know.

programme.title: Yeti Confetti Chapter 4: Lucy's Instrument
programme.desc: Lucy goes to Yeti school to find her instrument.

programme.title: Yeti Confetti Chapter 5: Where's The Confetti
programme.desc: When it doesn't snow on the final day of Yeti Confetti, a Yet Elder blames Lucy. In order to proves she belongs Lucy tries to find a way to make it snow.

programme.title: Puddle And The King Chapter 1: Honey, Moondog
programme.desc: The King leaves Hedgehog and Oscar in charge of the kingdom while he and Puddle are away, their only duty is to carry out the Swan-Upping.

programme.title: Puddle And The King Chapter 2: Royally Bored
programme.desc: Hedgehog and Oscar discover alien jesters who live under the floorboards of the castle.

programme.title: Puddle And The King Chapter 3: All The King's Slides
programme.desc: Oscar, Hedgehog and Puddle must figure out what's wrong with the King when he orders the aliens to turn all the planet's sugar into salt.

programme.title: Chocolate Money Badgers
programme.desc: Oscar learns that he can earn merit badges that unlock prizes.

programme.title: Saxophone Come Home
programme.desc: Oscar befriends a teenage Yeti.

programme.title: Moon Problems

programme.title: Time Traveling Quick Pants

programme.title: Monster Babies
programme.desc: Alice lures Oscar and his monster friends for a tea party, but only to turn the monsters into cute babies.

programme.title: Hedgehog Werewolf
programme.desc: Hedgehog gets bit by a cute puppy and is starting to act strange.

programme.title: Mr. Softball
programme.desc: Susie challenges the campers to a game of softball to get out of doing a chore.

programme.title: Campers Above The Bed
programme.desc: Hedgehog finds a city underneath her bed as she looks for her missing diary.

programme.title: Pajama Pajimjams
programme.desc: Oscar pretends to be a talking pair of pajamas named 'Jimjams' to make his friend Pajamas happy.

programme.title: The First Day
programme.desc: Best friends Oscar and Hedgehog get dropped off at their first day at summer camp.

programme.title: Ice Cream Headache
programme.desc: The campers get magical powers from the witches supply of magic ice cream.

programme.title: Ghost The Boy
programme.desc: Oscar and Hedgehog befriend a ghost who can't remember who he is.

programme.title: Popular Banana Split
programme.desc: Hedgehog and Max discover a tiny high school when they are accidentally shrunk by a science experiment.

programme.title: Oscar And Hedgehog's Melody
programme.desc: Susie holds the annual talent show that has the rest of the campers competing to win.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda 3
programme.desc: Po must face two hugely epic, but different threats: one supernatural and the other a little closer to home.

programme.title: The National Dog Show ('20)
programme.desc: From the Kennel Club of Philadelphia, this cherished competition for all dog lovers returns for the 17th year. Hosted by John O'Hurley, the event features 2,000 of the nation's leading canines, including the world's largest, smallest and most exotic. Over

programme.title: We Bare Bears: The Movie
programme.desc: When the bears' love of food trucks and viral videos gets out of hand, the menacing Agent Trout from the National Wildlife Control pledges to restore the 'natural order' by separating them forever.

programme.title: Rango
programme.desc: A sheltered chameleon with an identity crisis finds himself in a town plagued by bandits and must play the hero to protect it.

programme.title: Hoop Dreams
programme.desc: Kentucky based Top Chef alum Ed Lee drops by for a Quickfire that's part trivia, part culinary creativity. Then, the Chefs head to Rupp Arena where legendary basketball Coach John Calipari and the UK Wildcats host a concession stand cook-off. Food & Wine

programme.title: The Greatest
programme.desc: Top Chef can't go to Kentucky without taking a turn at fried chicken. Chef Art Smith guests judges a secret herbs and spices blind taste test ahead of the Quickfire fry-off. After the finger licking goodness, the Chefs turn their attention to another Kent

programme.title: Kentucky Farewell
programme.desc: All season the chefs have been growing gardens at their Kentucky estate. Tom ambushes the sleeping chefs and challenges them to reap what they sowed and make a dish focused on their garden harvest. Then, for the last elimination challenge in Kentucky, the

programme.title: Tad, The Lost Explorer, And The Secret Of King Midas
programme.desc: Tad travels to Las Vegas to see his friend Sara's latest discovery - a papyrus who turns everything he touches into gold.

programme.title: Oblivion
programme.desc: A veteran assigned to extract Earth's remaining resources begins to question his mission and his being.

programme.title: My Science Project
programme.desc: Jake has a robot arm implanted in his skull.

programme.title: Chew On This
programme.desc: Adam's offhanded complaint about the lack of 'human food' in the cafeteria .

programme.title: The "A" Word
programme.desc: Jake is insulted that Adam did not pay him the ultimate monkey compliment.

programme.title: Two Tons Of Fun
programme.desc: Adam and Jake agree to coach the painfully shy Mr. H .

programme.title: Docu-Trauma
programme.desc: When a nature documentary filmmaker comes to Charles Darwin Middle School, she focuses on Adam.

programme.title: Supplies Party
programme.desc: When his human friends and animal friends both accidentally get invited to his birthday bash at the local pizza palace, Adam has to find ways to keep the two groups apart or risk embarrassing himself in front of his old school's BMOC.

programme.title: She's Koala That
programme.desc: Ignoring warnings from his pals, Adam befriends a sad little koala named Deidre.

programme.title: Political Animals
programme.desc: Looking to make some changes around CDMS, Adam enters the school elections, and goes up against seemingly unstoppable political powerhouse, Bull Sharkowski. Adam ultimately wins the brutal campaign.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Smoothie Shop / The Crew Builds A Dino Roof Party
programme.desc: Cafe Carl opens up a smoothie shop on the boardwalk! But when the coaster causes coconut chaos, Rubble & Crew know just what to do. // Rubble & Crew work together to find a construction solution when Charger's bouncy birthday surprise needs a lift!

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Ferris Wheel / The Crew Builds A Farm Animal Yoga Space
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew want to give Grocer Gabriel the best beach day ever... including a ride on a brand new Ferris wheel at the boardwalk! // When Farmer Zoe's animals need some relaxation, the pups build a perfect place to practice yoga with Coach Karima.

programme.title: Crabby Wedding / The Cloud Kingdom
programme.desc: Dora's crab friends are getting married but Swiper swipes the ring and loses it in the ocean. Dora has to get the ring back! / Dora and Boots meet Vicky the Vicuna who is missing her magic flute that she needs to go back to the Cloud Kingdom.

programme.title: Partly Claudia / Ranita's Magic Stripes
programme.desc: Dora and Boots take Claudia, an energetic young rain cloud, to rain on a dry water slide. / Boots gets a case of Tickle Tail that Ranita the Frog can cure if she gets her magic stripes by helping friends around the Rainforest.

programme.title: Clock and Dance / Barbapileup
programme.desc: The barbababies prepare a show for Barbamama's birthday. While Barbalala finishes up, they go to the carnival where Barbabeau gets stuck in an attraction. // Three separate stories telescope into a big final bouquet in the middle of the courtyard.

programme.title: Relay Tales / The Barbababies' World
programme.desc: Barbalib, Barbalala and Barbabelle take turns as narrators to tell a story, each one bringing a very personal touch to it. // The Barbapapa family spends a day at the beach. Divided into 2 teams, the barbababies fight over a sandy peninsula.

programme.title: Greedyguts / Where is Bali?
programme.desc: A goat has escaped from the mountain and is coming to wreak havoc, devouring everything in its path! // Bali is nowhere to be found, and the Barbapapa deploy all their imagination to look for her. They have no idea that a nice surprise awaits them!

programme.title: Barbabright Has a Secret / Super Duper Cool
programme.desc: Barbabright acts strangely. What is he hiding ? The Barbabbabies will do anything to find out. // The Barbapapa decide to save energy. But their efforts are undermined by Barbabright and Barbabelle who build a secret energy-consuming project.

programme.title: Barba TV / The Museum
programme.desc: The barbababies are glued to the TV. Since they love it so much, their parents encourage them to make their own shows. // The Barbapapa visit the museum of evolution. On the program: creation of the Earth, Precambrian submarine and... dinosaurs!

programme.title: The Crew And Skye Build A Mountain Lodge
programme.desc: Skye visits Rubble & Crew from Adventure Bay when their construction project needs some aerial support. But when Speed Meister tries to beat the pups to finish the job, Skye, Rubble, and the rest of the crew jump into rescue mode to save the day!

programme.title: The Crew Builds Mr. Ducky-Doo A Special Diving Board / The Crew Builds A Rainwater Tank
programme.desc: Mayor Greatway asks Rubble & Crew to build something special for her friend Mr. Ducky-Doo. But soon a construction mystery is afoot... // Rubble & Crew work to build a rain tank for Farmer Zoe before a storm, until a chicken complication crops up.

programme.title: Pups Save a Pool Day / Circus Pup-Formers
programme.desc: It's a hot day and the pups head for the water park - but the pool is empty! Paw Patrol to the rescue. // When the animals don't show up in time for the Circus to start; Ryder and the Paw Patrol step in to help.

programme.title: Pups Save a Super Pup / Pups Save Ryder's Robot
programme.desc: Rubble is pretending to be a super pup but get's himself in some trouble. Ryder and the Paw Patrol have to save Rubble! // When Ryder's Robot Pup breaks and starts going wild around Adventure Bay, it takes the whole Paw Patrol to help Ryder find it.

programme.title: The Mountain Eater / The First Day Of School
programme.desc: Barbapapa tells the Barbababies about his extraordinary encounter with a wolf. // Tomorrow is the Barbababies' first day of school.

programme.title: The Barbapapa Tree / The Barbababies' birthday
programme.desc: Barbapapa and Barbamama return to the tree they were born under. It's in bad condition. They must rescue it quickly without disturbing the nearby animals. // It's the Barbababies's birthday. They all want to do something different with Barbapapa!

programme.title: Time Out
programme.desc: Tim tries to relax, but Tia has other ideas.

programme.title: Cookies
programme.desc: Tim gets the best cookies in town but soon finds that others need them more than him.

programme.title: Beach Scanner
programme.desc: Tim and Kai try to uncover trinkets buried at the beach.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Treehouse / The Crew Builds A Chicken Feeder
programme.desc: Park Ranger Rose's favorite tree might be off limits for climbing unless Rubble and Grandpa can come up with a solution. / The Crew build a feeder for Farmer Zoe's chickens, but when they get loose, it's up to the pups to safely rescue them.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Roller Coaster/The Crew Builds Motor A Play Space
programme.desc: When Speed Meister's rollercoaster sends a pet playdate out of control, Rubble & Crew save the day with a bigger, better, and safer coaster. // The Bark Yard safety inspection is today! But will Motor go boom and cost the Crew a gold safety star?

programme.title: Dora's Mermaid Adventure / Mermazing Surprise
programme.desc: Dora and Boots become mermaids and help Marisol the Mermaid save her home, Sirena Sea! // Dora and Boots go across the sea to help their dolphin friend find the best gift ever, a magic jewel!

programme.title: AJ to the Rescue
programme.desc: Blaze and AJ are racing through the jungle when Blaze gets trapped in super sticky mud! Now it's up to AJ and his new animal friends, to go on an epic adventure to save Blaze!

programme.title: Big Help Croc / Pom Pom
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile volunteers to help too many friends with their projects all at the same time. // Daisy and Mr. Crocodile invite a new friend, PomPom, to live with them.

programme.title: The Cave Barbapapas / The Little Monsters
programme.desc: The barbababies discover a strange cave. Barbalib tells the story of the caves Barbapapa and how they transformed. // The Barbababies have a sleepover in the living room. Fearing the monsters in the closet, they set up wacky traps to catch them.

programme.title: The Perfect Dinner / The Kittens
programme.desc: Barbapapa and Barbamama go out to celebrate their birthdays. Barbabelle is in charge and gets overwhelmed. // Barbabelle watches Bali's kittens. She's scared something will happen and won't let them out. Barbamama must intervene to help the kittens.

programme.title: Shooting Star / Ball / Balloon
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy, Tia and Dad get stuck on a remote asteroid. // Tim, Kai and Tommy try to get their ball back from Mum's bedroom. // Tia's new balloon gets stuck in a tree, so Tim tries to get it down.

programme.title: The Super Skateboard
programme.desc: It's Grammy's birthday but Crusher doesn't have enough money for a special gift! So, Blaze and AJ help him do different jobs and earn the money for Grammy's present. But, they have to hurry so they can be back in time for Grammy's birthday party!

programme.title: Knights in Sparkling Armor
programme.desc: When Crusher and Pickle are trapped inside a cage over a bubbling slime swap, it's up to Blaze, AJ, and Sparkle to become...Knights! Will they be able to rescue Crusher and Pickle from the swamp before it's too late?

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Dinosaur Museum / The Crew Builds a Wheelchair Ramp
programme.desc: After uncovering dinosaur bones, the pups decide to build a dinosaur museum! // When Omar the Mail Carrier breaks his foot, it's up to the pups to make sure he can still deliver the mail by building ramps all over town.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Splash Park / The Crew Builds A Playroom
programme.desc: With their splash park plans in troubled waters, the pups have to get creative to cool down the town for the summer. // As the pups work on building a surprise playroom for Lucas and Lily, a squirrelly visitor causes construction complications.

programme.title: Pups Save a Sweet Mayor / Pups Save a Magic Trick
programme.desc: Encased in a huge chocolate bunny, Humdinger is carried away by hungry raccoons and ends up floating in Adventure Bay with a curious dolphin. // When a magic trick goes awry, the Adventure Bay Easter Festival is overrun by wild bunnies.

programme.title: Pups Save a Rubble-Double / Pups Save a Clown
programme.desc: Rubble dreams that he's been taken aboard a spaceship and meets his alien double. When the ship crashes on an alien planet, he needs help. // The Pups must save Humdinger and his kittens when they mess around with Toodles the Clown's tiny clown car.

programme.title: Rainbow's Lost Colors / Boots' Rubber Band Ball
programme.desc: The twins are excited to see their first rainbow, but it's missing its colors! Dora sets off to return its azul, rojo, y amarillo. // Boots' rubber band ball bounces into the Forest Next Door, and he must ask Cynthia the Centipede to get it back.

programme.title: Ranita's Magic Stripes
programme.desc: Boots gets a case of Tickle Tail that Ranita the Frog can cure if she gets her magic stripes by helping friends around the Rainforest.

programme.title: Beach Scanner
programme.desc: Tim and Kai try to uncover trinkets buried at the beach.

programme.title: Tidy
programme.desc: Tim has a clearout of all his old stuff, but soon finds not all of it is destined for the rubbish bin.

programme.title: Pets
programme.desc: Tim, Tia and Tommy try to convince Mum and Dad to let them have a pet.

programme.title: Flying on Holiday Part 1
programme.desc: The Pig family are going on vacation. Peppa and George pack their favorite toys and Granny and Grandpa are left to look after Goldie the Fish.

programme.title: The Holiday House Part 2
programme.desc: Peppa and her family arrive in Italy. Everyone is talking in a different language and Daddy Pig finds driving on the right a little difficult.

programme.title: Holiday in the Sun Part 3
programme.desc: On the first day in their vacation villa, Peppa and her family go exploring in the local village.

programme.title: End of the Holiday Part 4
programme.desc: Peppa has enjoyed her very first holiday abroad, but it is now time to go home. She can't wait to see Suzy and Goldie again.

programme.title: Mirrors
programme.desc: George has fun looking at himself in the mirror. Peppa and George try to find other shiny things to see themselves in.

programme.title: Rocky's Cat-astrophe
programme.desc: Rocky bites off more than he can chew when he invites a kitten to stay at the Lookout overnight. As the irascible kitten who idolizes Rocky causes more trouble than expected.

programme.title: The Seven Foods / The Perfect Portrait
programme.desc: The Barbababies think their food can make them change colours and shapes. They decide to find the right food for each of them. // Barbabeau lacks inspiration, he can't create anymore. The whole family helps by suggesting new subjects to paint.

programme.title: Stuck On You / Pest Friend
programme.desc: Daisy worries she and Winston will be stuck together forever when they get tangled in Winston's jump rope. // Daisy and Mr. Crocodile try to help Roland find a best friend to take to an acorn show.

programme.title: CAKE-tastrophe!
programme.desc: When a hungry Crusher accidentally turns the baker truck's baker bots to messy mode, they sprout wheels and drive away! It's up to AJ and Blaze to track down all the rampaging robots before Axle City is blanketed in baked goods.

programme.title: The Mystery Bandit
programme.desc: When a mysterious bandit makes off with Blaze's metallic trophy, he must track down the culprit in this preschool whodunit!

programme.title: The Crew Builds Library Treasure Tunnels / The Crew Builds A Super Snack Dispenser
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew's favorite book series has new additions! But when there's no room for them in the library, the pups have to get creative.// The pups have a surprise just for Rubble... a snack dispenser! But will they finish it before Rubble finds out?

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Hair Salon / The Crew Builds A Colorful Crystal Show
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew build a hair salon just in time for Grandpa Gravel's special photo-until they run into a squirrely shampoo setback! / Motor and Lily make a shiny discovery worth celebrating... with the coolest light show the pups have ever seen!

programme.title: Pups Save a Rocket Roller Skater / Pups Save Ryder's Surprise
programme.desc: A mix-up delivery leads to Ms. Marjorie and Danny speeding out of control in Adventure Bay. Now the Pups must rescue them. // Ryder's present ends up in the jungle and Carlos is trapped in a Jungle Gym. It's up to the Pups to save them.

programme.title: Pups Save the Marooned Mayors / Pups Save the Game Show
programme.desc: While out ice fishing in the North Country, Mayors Goodway and Humdinger, along with Chickaletta, get stuck in an ice crevasse. // The Wingnuts' farm plays host to a rootin' tootin Game Show hosted by Cowgirl Beryl!

programme.title: The Barbapapa Tree / The Barbababies' birthday
programme.desc: Barbapapa and Barbamama return to the tree they were born under. It's in bad condition. They must rescue it quickly without disturbing the nearby animals. // It's the Barbababies's birthday. They all want to do something different with Barbapapa!

programme.title: Bada-Bam / The Barbamartians
programme.desc: Barbabright captured a melody from Mars. The Barbapapas build a rocket to go to the red planet. // While travelling to Mars, the Barbapapas meet a family of Barbamartians. They have no time to get acquainted when a giant plant attacks the village.

programme.title: Roadtrip / Tickets / Talent Show
programme.desc: The Rex family go on a road trip through the galaxy to get to Rocket World // Tim & Kai compete to get Terri's spare Space-Land ticket // Tim, Tia & Tommy decide to put on a talent show, but then they can't decide who should go first...

programme.title: Shooting Star / Ball / Balloon
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy, Tia and Dad get stuck on a remote asteroid. // Tim, Kai and Tommy try to get their ball back from Mum's bedroom. // Tia's new balloon gets stuck in a tree, so Tim tries to get it down.

programme.title: Tongue Twisted Troll / Chompy and the Cloud Flower
programme.desc: Dora and Boots help Grumpy Old Troll untwist his tongue with Quickatoo's help. // Dora and Boots help Chompy find another Cloud Flower Seed after he accidentally eats Isa's.

programme.title: Tio Tesoro's Treasure / The Great Key Mystery
programme.desc: Dora, Boots, and Map help Tio Tesoro find his treasure trackers and become a treasure map again. // Dora and Boots investigate a mysterious key so they can discover more about Dora's great-great grandma, the first exploradora.

programme.title: Jukebox
programme.desc: Peppa, George, Granny and Grandpa Pig visit the sailing club where they find a juke box. They have fun dancing to all different types of music.

programme.title: Windmills
programme.desc: Peppa and friends are at playgroup and Mr Bull is building a wind turbine. Madame Gazelle tells the children all about wind power, whilst Mr Bull and the workmen have a lovely cup of tea made from wind power.

programme.title: Mandy Mouse's Birthday
programme.desc: Mandy Mouse has a birthday visit to a cheese theme park with Peppa and her friends. Everything in the park is cheese-themed - Mandy loves cheese!

programme.title: The Sandcastle
programme.desc: Peppa and her family have a day out at the seaside and build a very large sandcastle with all their friends.

programme.title: Muddy Puddles
programme.desc: It's raining and Peppa is sad because she can't go out to play. When the rain stops, Peppa feels better and she and George get ready to play one of their favorite games - jumping in mud puddles!

programme.title: Mr Dinosaur is Lost
programme.desc: George's favourite toy is Mr.Dinosaur. One day Mr.Dinosaur gets stuck up a tree and George thinks he is lost, so Peppa helps George find him.

programme.title: Best Friend
programme.desc: Peppa Pig's best friend, Suzy Sheep, comes over to visit.

programme.title: The Flying Lion
programme.desc: Blaze and AJ are excited to play with their new friend Roarian, the Flying Lion! But when Roarian loses his magical sunstone, he turns into a statue! Now it's up to Blaze and AJ to find the sunstone and restore Roarian's powers!

programme.title: Pups Save a Roo
programme.desc: It's a switcheroo situation when a joey is separated from its mama. It's up to the pups to save a roo and the day!

programme.title: 天才冲冲冲
programme.desc: 「寓教于乐」的大型综艺节目, 节目单元不仅推陈出新, 在生活中更能与三五好友, 一同尝试节目中的各项游戏, 亲身体验节目中的各项乐趣。

programme.title: 亲爱的客栈2026
programme.desc: 节目以"慢下来，趣生活"为核心，经营一家有趣、好玩、有温度的年轻客栈。在经营与体验中，解锁未知惊喜，邂逅温暖故事，共赴一场关于陪伴、治愈与热爱的"趣生活"之旅。

programme.title: 声生不息·华流季
programme.desc: 以"华流国际化"为核心，《声生不息·华流季》以音乐对抗与融合为引，推动华语音乐走向世界。从金曲回忆到文化共鸣，跨越三代的声音在舞台上汇聚，用旋律唤醒集体记忆，谱写属于华语乐坛的自信新章。

programme.title: 山海夏味
programme.desc: 《山海夏味》通过市井美食和鲜味文化，探访街头小店的烹饪智慧与地域精神。节目打破精致摆盘套路，用生动镜头展现活鱼、热锅等原始食材冲击力，聚焦坚守在烟火中的普通人，呈现一方水土的饮食江湖与生活哲学。

programme.title: 去湘当有味的地方
programme.desc: 汪涵作为大哥带领沈梦辰、吴泽林网罗全省美食，借此展现14个市州丰富多元的湘菜味道，透过美食背后的故事，展现湖南各地独特的乡情烟火气。

programme.title: 夜限照相馆
programme.desc: 剧情讲述只为逝者存在的鬼客专门照相馆的刻薄摄影师徐奇周（周元饰）和热血的律师韩春（权娜拉饰）与阴森森的夜客们来往于生死之间惊险又奇妙的故事。

programme.title: 灼灼风流

programme.title: Branded
programme.desc: When Benson and Stabler investigate a brutal attack on an unassuming, upstanding father, they find he's also been branded on his chest with a wire coat hanger.

programme.title: The Glass Cage
programme.desc: An electronically guarded prison confronts the Impossible Missions Force when it tries to free a political prisoner from an escape-proof glass cell.

programme.title: Penetration
programme.desc: FBI Agent Dana Lewis is assaulted by a stranger and asks Benson to have her rape kit tested. Before the cops can really help her, Lewis goes back undercover and refuses to talk about the_x000D_assignment or the rape.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW
programme.desc: Diego Gomez's path to the Premier League has been shaped across continents. Beginning his career in Paraguay, the midfielder earned a move to Inter Miami, where he developed his game alongside some of football's biggest names such as Lionel Messi. programme.title: PL MOMENTS
programme.desc: In a career spanning nearly two decades, Gary Cahill claimed every prize available in his illustrious career. Two Premier League titles, two FA Cups, a Champions League winner and many more - the Derbyshire born Centre Back left an indelible mark on the English game. This week, Cahill sits down on the PL Moments sofa to reflect on his journey and talk us though his top 10 Premier League career moments.

programme.title: PL STORIES
programme.desc: Three decades on from Manchester United's iconic Class of '92, PL Stories steps beyond the headline names to rediscover the teammates who shared the same dressing room, dreams, and demands of one of football's most revered youth systems. We sit down with the lesser-known graduates who lived that journey first-hand, players whose paths diverged from the global spotlight but whose experiences offer a rare and revealing window into the reality behind the legend.

programme.title: Killed For The Cash
programme.desc: When a Texas gas store owner, Subir Chatterjee, 58, is shot inside his cheque-cashing booth in 2002, detectives suspect his killer is someone Subir knew.

programme.title: Even In Cuffs I Look Good
programme.desc: A young man is taken into custody for public intoxication, while a woman is arrested for lying to police. In Modesto, a teen is hit with a felony charge for criminal threats of violence.

programme.title: Kids Who Kill - Alyssa Bustamante
programme.desc: Troubled teen Alyssa Bustamante was a self-styled 'bad girl' who said she wanted to know how it felt to kill. She gave in to this curiosity and murdered her nine-year-old neighbour Elizabeth Olten.
A woman who killed her husband is disowned by her children in court; a teacher who slept with her teenaged students apologises to the victims' families; and more.
An irate plaintiff storms out of her virtual hearing and is charged with contempt; a quadruple murderer sobs uncontrollably at sentencing; a judge breaks down laughing at a defendant's complaints.

programme.title: Ringside Seat
programme.desc: Tulsa homicide delves into a dark world of drugs and prostitution to solve the murder of a man executed in his car in a motel parking lot.

programme.title: Negligent Midwife Or Responsible Caregiver?
programme.desc: An unlicensed midwife assists a home birth that ends in tragedy. The defence says she made the right calls, but the prosecution charges her with negligent child abuse resulting in death.

programme.title: Killed For The Cash
programme.desc: When a Texas gas store owner, Subir Chatterjee, 58, is shot inside his cheque-cashing booth in 2002, detectives suspect his killer is someone Subir knew.

programme.title: Even In Cuffs I Look Good
programme.desc: A young man is taken into custody for public intoxication, while a woman is arrested for lying to police. In Modesto, a teen is hit with a felony charge for criminal threats of violence.

programme.title: Kids Who Kill - Alyssa Bustamante
programme.desc: Troubled teen Alyssa Bustamante was a self-styled 'bad girl' who said she wanted to know how it felt to kill. She gave in to this curiosity and murdered her nine-year-old neighbour Elizabeth Olten.

programme.title: Meet Up For Murder
programme.desc: After an immigrant, lured by a woman, is beaten to death, Gwinnett County Police discover that one of the three suspects believes no one will care about him because he's Mexican.

programme.title: Four Shots
programme.desc: A construction worker is killed by a stray bullet during an attempted robbery inside a trailer park, but when investigators follow the trail of the suspects, things are not what they seem.
A woman who killed her husband is disowned by her children in court; a teacher who slept with her teenaged students apologises to the victims' families; and more.
An irate plaintiff storms out of her virtual hearing and is charged with contempt; a quadruple murderer sobs uncontrollably at sentencing; a judge breaks down laughing at a defendant's complaints.

programme.title: Ringside Seat
programme.desc: Tulsa homicide delves into a dark world of drugs and prostitution to solve the murder of a man executed in his car in a motel parking lot.

programme.title: Negligent Midwife Or Responsible Caregiver?
programme.desc: An unlicensed midwife assists a home birth that ends in tragedy. The defence says she made the right calls, but the prosecution charges her with negligent child abuse resulting in death.

programme.title: Lynlee Renick
programme.desc: When renowned snake-breeder Ben Renick is found dead in his snake facility, law enforcement assumes he is a victim of one of his deadly snakes.

programme.title: Vigilante Justice
programme.desc: When a 19-year-old struggling to make it on her own goes missing, her family kicks into high gear to find her.

programme.title: Money, Murder And Malicious Intent
programme.desc: On his last day as an undercover agent, Bergen County Detective Carlos James experiences his first shootout, and ATF Agent Jenn Eskew poses as a hitwoman to investigate a possible murder for hire.

programme.title: San Sabas Deadly Harvest
programme.desc: A historic Texan town is stunned when a popular caretaker is found dead and a beloved resident goes missing. But with support from a concerned community, detectives uncover the secrets that led to murder.

programme.title: Drug Bandits
programme.desc: With an estimated 1.7 million drug addicts in the Philippines, drug trafficking accounts for nearly US$20 million every day in profits.

programme.title: Pirates
programme.desc: From modern-day pirates of Aceh who are armed to the teeth to fearless national coast guards, uncover the dangers of the high seas in South-East Asia.

programme.title: I Saw The Devil
programme.desc: November 23, 2014, Springfield, Oregon. A housekeeper at the Village Inn Motel calls police when she finds a guest unresponsive and cold to the touch.

programme.title: Kay Baker
programme.desc: When a beloved Florida teacher is found beaten to death on a neighbour’s lawn, a blood trail leads detectives to her partner-and exposes a violent history fuelled by jealousy.

programme.title: Digital Obsession
programme.desc: Investigators trying to determine who shot and killed a young mother in Ohio are tipped off by a surprising piece of digital evidence. They unravel a twisted story of stalking and social media catfishing.

programme.title: Murderous Wife Or Battered Spouse?
programme.desc: The wife claims she has no memory of wounding him, but when the police investigate, she is charged with second-degree murder. Is she a murderous wife or a battered spouse?
